## 🎯 GITHUB ACTIONS WORKFLOWS - NOW LIVE

### 7 Automated CI/CD Pipelines

**1. Multi-Repo Sync Workflow**
- Syncs 7 git submodules every day
- Updates component versions
- Auto-creates releases
- Handles dry-run mode

**2. Component Version Check**
- Verifies compatibility between versions
- Detects breaking changes
- Analyzes dependency chains
- Auto-updates pull requests

**3. Build All Modules**
- 14 parallel build jobs
- 7 components × 2 build types
- Multi-system support (CMake, Rust, Python)
- Test execution + coverage reporting

**4. Build Variant Testing**
- Tests all 7 build variants
- Validates component inclusion
- Tests installation
- Verifies functionality

**5. Code Registry Compression**
- 4 compression algorithms tested
- Calculates optimal ratio
- Generates registry metadata
- Auto-commits to repo

**6. Wiki Generator (Most Comprehensive)**
- Creates SQLite documentation database
- Generates HTML wiki with navigation
- Creates Mermaid architecture diagrams
- Extracts component documentation

**7. Status Dashboard**
- Real-time health metrics
- Updates README badges
- Generates interactive HTML dashboard
- Creates alert notifications

## 🎊 WHAT YOU CAN DO RIGHT NOW

### Use Build System Immediately
```powershell
cd C:\Users\ADMIN\helios-platform\scripts\build-manager
.\select-build.ps1
.\compare-builds.ps1
.\create-snapshot.ps1
```

### Use AI Services Immediately
```powershell
cd C:\Users\ADMIN\helios-platform\scripts\ai-integration

# ChatGPT Pro
.\chatgpt-pro\sync-with-chatgpt.ps1

# Codex
.\codex-integration\generate-code-snippets.ps1

# Orchestration
.\ai-coordination\detect-ai-conflicts.ps1
```

### Use Build Agents Immediately
```powershell
cd C:\Users\ADMIN\helios-platform\scripts\build-agents\orchestrator

# Test (dry run)
.\run-all-agents.ps1 -DryRun

# Execute
.\run-all-agents.ps1
.\run-agents-parallel.ps1

# Monitor
.\check-agent-status.ps1
```

### Launch DevContainer Immediately
```bash
cd .devcontainer
docker-compose up -d
docker-compose exec devcontainer bash
```

### Use Wiki System Immediately
```powershell
cd C:\Users\ADMIN\helios-platform\scripts\utilities\wiki
.\wiki-orchestrate.ps1 -Action full
.\wiki-search.ps1 -Query "security"
```
